releases.author: phongviez
releases.description:
Initial release of Index Flow.

## Features
- Smart renumbering for markdown lists
- Remove numbering when needed
- Designed for fast editing inside Obsidian

## Notes
- First public release
- Compatible with the version specified in manifest.json
